title: 《冬夜读书示子聿》 - 陆游
description: 古人学问无遗力，少壮工夫老始成。纸上得来终觉浅，绝知此事要躬行。
story: Made in 2025. Poem in running script. Meaning: Learning requires hard work and time, but shouldn't be restricted to only reading books, experience is also important.

title: Paper Lantern with Lotus
story: Made in 2025. In running script. Meaning: Live freely.

title: 《黄鹤楼送孟浩然之广陵》 - 李白
description: 故人西辞黄鹤楼，烟花三月下扬州。孤帆远影碧空尽，唯见长江天际流
story: Made in 2026. Poem in cursive script. Meaning: Saying farewell to a close friend.

title: Think Of Nature And Be At Peace
story: Made in 2026. Proverb in small seal script.
